sidebar.empty: Nothing yet. Open or drop a file, or play some text — it'll show up here.

editor.label: Text to speak
editor.placeholder: Type, Enter to speak (Shift+Enter for a new line)…

controls.downloadTooltip: Download as audio file (generates the whole document)
controls.exporting: Generating full audio… {pct}% — click to cancel

errors.noAudio: No audio chunks received. The TTS engine finished without producing audio.
errors.engineUnreachable: Couldn't reach the TTS engine. Make sure Node.js is installed and on your PATH.

drop.overlay: Drop a TXT, EPUB, or PDF to load its text

update.ready: A newer version of Out Loud is ready to download.

about.title: Out Loud
about.shortcutEnter: Speak the text, then clear it
about.shortcutEsc: Jump back to the text box
about.typeSpeakBody: Press Enter to speak the text and clear the box, and keep typing the next line while the last is still playing — the text box never locks and the cursor never leaves it. Use Shift+Enter for a new line, or the Play button to speak without clearing.
about.pausesBody: Insert a silence anywhere with a tag — all of these are equivalent:
about.pausesPunctuation: Punctuation also pauses automatically: period/semicolon ≈ 0.4s, colon ≈ 0.3s, comma ≈ 0.2s, a new line ≈ 0.4s.
